narrative:
Springfield Twp E (precinct in Summit County) has 1,020 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
